message:
test(frankenterm-core): add 36 tests for selection.rs (bd-354fy)

Expand selection.rs test coverage from 5 to 41 tests covering:
- BufferPos construction and viewport offset conversion
- Selection::normalized swap and identity cases
- Selection::char_at for regular, wide, zero-width, and OOB cols
- Selection::line_at for full-width, scrollback, OOB, and zero-cols
- Selection::word_at for punctuation, whitespace, URL, single-char
- Selection::extract_text for wide chars, trailing trim, reversed,
  multiline, empty grid, and OOB clamping
- Helper functions: classify_char, is_word_char, trim_trailing_spaces

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
